name: Orange Poppyseed Dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. In a screw-top jar, combine all ingredients.
2. Vigorously shake the jar until well mixed.
3. Chill the dressing in the refrigerator until ready to serve.
This dressing pairs well with any green salad, but adding small chunks of cantelope, honeydew, or star fruit can enhance the orange-honey flavor. It also complements slices of cold roast pork served over watercress with nectarine wedges.
